01

Preparing Data
in Excel

Lab exercise exploring the fundamentals of data cleaning in Microsoft Excel. Covers removing inconsistencies, formatting raw data for readability, and preparing datasets for analysis and decision-making.

Microsoft ExcelData CleaningSpreadsheet
View spreadsheet

02

Pivot Tables &
Data Visualization

Created Excel pivot tables to analyze bicycle sales data across demographic groups and countries. Explored purchasing patterns and visualized trends using charts derived from pivot table summaries.

ExcelPivot TablesData AnalyticsCharts
View spreadsheet

03

Data Normalization
with Power Query

Normalized a flat student record dataset using Excel Power Query. Transformed unstructured data into relational tables following the Relational Data Model to reduce redundancy.

ExcelPower QueryNormalizationRelational Model

04

SQL Data Cleaning
& Analysis

Used MySQL Workbench to write stored procedures that clean and analyze call center data. Executed multi-result queries across schemas including disease outbreak and death rate tables.

MySQLSQLStored ProceduresData Cleaning

05

Power BI Workflow
& Data Modeling

Built a complete Power BI workflow covering data acquisition, star schema modeling, DAX measures, and dashboard visualization. Includes a US Airlines Flight Data Dashboard with KPIs and delay analysis.

Power BIStar SchemaDAXDashboard

06

DAX Time Intelligence
Functions

Created DAX time intelligence measures in Power BI to manipulate filter context for date-based calculations. Built a relational data model connecting Sales, Product, Region, Reseller, and Date tables.

Power BIDAXTime IntelligenceData Modeling

07

Power BI Report
Design

Designed a three-page Power BI report for Adventure Works sales data — Overview with sales & profit margin charts, a Profit summary table, and a My Performance page with sales vs. target comparisons. Published to Power BI service.

Power BIReport DesignData VisualizationAdventure Works

About me

Hi there

Hi i'm Hosh! 3rd-year college student currently surviving deadlines, caffeine, and debugging sessions while chasing my goal of becoming a front-end developer. I’m passionate about creating websites that don’t just work, but actually look good and feel interactive. Outside of coding, I’m also into graphic design, so I love mixing creativity with tech to build projects that are clean, modern, and visually satisfying.

I usually work with platforms like Visual Studio Code, Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Canva, and GitHub to bring my ideas to life. Whether it’s designing layouts, building responsive interfaces, or making random creative concepts at 2AM, I’m always down to learn, create, and level up my skills.

Outside of academics and projects, I love going out with my partner and our friends, exploring new places, and experiencing life from different perspectives. Those moments keep me inspired, creative, and open-minded both in design and in life.
